name: katana
description: Agent-driven kanban workflow for AI coding agents with MCP tools for Katana documents, phases, validation, and decomposition.

interface.shortDescription: Kanban workflow and decomposition tools for coding agents.
interface.longDescription: Adds Katana MCP tools for creating, reading, editing, listing, searching, transitioning, validating, and decomposing workflow documents in a .katana workspace.
defaultPrompt: Set up Katana workflow for this repo.
Decompose this Katana document into tasks.
